metadata.name: Process Final Payment and Release of Retainage

description: The project is complete and all punch list items are closed. The accountant must process the final payment to a subcontractor, including the release of held retainage.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the project has reached 'Final Completion' and all punch list items for the subcontractor are closed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all contractual obligations are met.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the final amount due, including the accumulated 10% retainage.

expected_outcome.value: The final payment amount is correctly calculated.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the final payment for the next payment cycle.

expected_outcome.value: The final payment is approved and scheduled in the accounting system.
